SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF, HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINONEZ, BORIS $3,103.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,163.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
